match.userMessage:
Handheld camera tracks forward at walking pace alongside Scarlett on the wide promenade as she moves with relaxed momentum, her hair lifting and drifting in the ocean breeze. She glances back over her shoulder toward the lens with effortless poise, surfers cresting on the pale horizon behind her. Fabric of her shirt flutters lightly in the wind while small sand particles drift across the path.

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves and light coastal breeze. light footsteps on boardwalk, fabric fluttering.
